visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white shirt and black sleeveless vest, stands in a brightly lit warehouse store aisle. She holds a red mesh bag containing two large orange pumpkins. The environment is industrial with high metal shelving. (2) A close-up shot focuses on the pumpkins in the red bag as the woman's hands with painted nails touch and inspect the product. Stacks of produce boxes are visible in the background. (3) The scene shifts back to a medium shot of the woman who is now gesturing with her hands while talking animatedly. Shelves of alcoholic beverages like Budweiser and Asahi are visible behind her. (4) The woman continues to speak enthusiastically, shifting her weight and using large hand motions to describe the pumpkins. The lighting is consistent, overhead warehouse lighting. (5) She lifts the pumpkin bag again, demonstrating its weight and size to the camera. Other customers and shopping carts are faintly visible in the distant background of the store aisle. (6) She is seen holding two separate bags of pumpkins to emphasize the deal. Her facial expressions are lively with wide eyes and a constant smile. (7) Final close-up on the pumpkin bag and a return to the woman's smiling face as she gives a final recommendation, pointing at the product.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Variety]: 總是特價. [Slogan]: 南瓜特價180 一顆只要90元. (2) [Slogan]: 一顆只要90元. (3) [Slogan]: 東昇南瓜. (4) [Slogan]: 上次我們買覺得超級好吃超甜. (5) [Slogan]: 拿來蒸或烤都還不錯. (6) [Slogan]: 那你覺得皮很硬嗎. (7) [Slogan]: 切的時候不好切 但蒸起來其實就軟掉了. (8) [Slogan]: 不會那個纖維還好. (9) [Slogan]: 因為我整個連皮拿去打成泥都很順. (10) [Slogan]: 它的口感非常的好. (11) [Variety]: 夠力!!!. [Slogan]: 但你的菜刀要夠力. (12) [Slogan]: 可以剁它 要夠大還要夠重. (13) [Slogan]: 很值得 這個很好吃. (14) [Slogan]: 東昇地瓜. (15) [Slogan]: 東昇南瓜. [Variety]: 哈哈哈. (16) [Slogan]: 推薦大家.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female character on screen throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long black hair, wearing a white long-sleeved shirt under a black button-up vest.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Costco warehouse interior with high-stack metal shelving, boxes of produce, and stacks of beer cases (Budweiser, Asahi).

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched female voice speaks with rapid-fire speed and high emotional arousal, introducing a product price at a warehouse store. An upbeat, major-key electronic pop BGM starts simultaneously at a moderate volume. (2) A second female voice off-camera asks a short question about the product's texture. The main speaker responds instantly, maintaining her excited and friendly tone. A subtle 'ding' SFX coincides with the appearance of a text banner. (3) The main speaker's voice intensifies as she emphasizes the strength required to cut the produce. The BGM remains steady with a clear rhythmic pulse. (4) The speaker concludes with a bubbly, high-arousal laugh and a enthusiastic recommendation statement. The BGM fades slightly at the very end. The overall audio mix is clean with clear vocal articulation and balanced music levels.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to promote a specific type of pumpkin (Tongsheng) available at Costco by highlighting its low price and high quality. The creator provides a mini-review, explaining its taste and cooking tips while maintaining an energetic and engaging persona for social media viewers.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video focuses on a specific product deal at Costco and provides a positive review to encourage purchase.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses typical 'variety show' style editing with large, colorful text overlays to capture attention on mobile platforms. There is a small typo/error in the text near the end where 'pumpkin' is written as 'sweet potato'.
